summary: Bug Fix Verified: Teacher allocation 'Componentes Curriculares' dropdown now shows courses correctly. The fix made nivel_ensino and grade_levels comparison case-insensitive and avoids filtering when education_level is null.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teacher allocation bug is fixed. The fix is in /app/frontend/src/hooks/useStaff.js lines 318-357 (filteredCourses memo). Case-insensitive comparison now works correctly and courses appear in dropdown after adding turma.

bug_verification.original_issue: When allocating a professor to a class, the 'Componentes Curriculares' dropdown appeared empty
bug_verification.fix_applied: Made nivel_ensino and grade_levels comparison case-insensitive, and don't filter when education_level is null
bug_verification.verification_result: SUCCESS - dropdown now shows all 9 courses

backend_api.GET /api/courses: PASS - Returns 9 courses with correct fields
backend_api.GET /api/schools: PASS - ESCOLA TESTE MULTISSERIADA with atendimento_integral=True

frontend_ui_flow.step_5_select_professor: PASS - Selected RICLEIDE DA SILVA GONÇALVES
frontend_ui_flow.step_8_click_plus_add_turma: PASS - Clicked + button to add turma
frontend_ui_flow.step_9_check_components: PASS - Dropdown shows 9 courses + TODOS option

code_review_notes.useStaff.js_filteredCourses: The case-insensitive fix correctly uses .toLowerCase() on both nivel_ensino and grade_levels comparisons. The fix also handles null/undefined education_level correctly by using niveisEnsino.size > 0 check.
